title: The Power of Daily Reading
intro_zh: 本文约1000词，探讨日常阅读对个人成长的影响，适合CET-4水平。文章包含核心词汇标注，每段附中文翻译，文末有词汇表。

paragraphs.en: Have you ever thought about how a simple habit like reading can transform your life? Many people underestimate the power of reading just 20 minutes a day. In fact, this small daily practice can significantly improve your knowledge, vocabulary, and even emotional well-being.
paragraphs.zh: 你是否想过，像阅读这样简单的习惯能够改变你的生活？许多人低估了每天只需阅读20分钟的力量。事实上，这种微小的日常实践能显著提升你的知识、词汇量，甚至情绪健康。

paragraphs.en: Reading broadens your horizon by exposing you to new ideas and culture. Whether you read fiction or non-fiction, each book is a window into a different world. It helps you understand people from various backgrounds and civilize your mind with diverse perspectives.
paragraphs.zh: 阅读通过让你接触新思想和文化来拓宽你的视野。无论你读的是小说还是非虚构作品，每本书都是一扇通往不同世界的窗户。它帮助你理解来自不同背景的人，并用多元的视角教化你的心灵。

paragraphs.en: Moreover, reading regularly can improve your language skills. When you read, you naturally learn new words and expressions. This not only helps in exams like CET-4 but also in daily communication. Your writing and speaking become more fluent and accurate.
paragraphs.zh: 此外，定期阅读能提高你的语言技能。阅读时，你会自然习得新单词和表达。这不仅有助于像四级这样的考试，也有助于日常交流。你的写作和口语会变得更加流利和准确。

paragraphs.en: Reading also has a positive effect on your motivation. Many successful people attribute their achievements to reading. For example, Bill Gates reads about 50 books a year. Their stories can inspire you to set higher goals and work harder.
paragraphs.zh: 阅读对你的积极性也有正面影响。许多成功人士将其成就归功于阅读。例如，比尔·盖茨每年大约读50本书。他们的故事可以激励你设定更高的目标并更加努力。

paragraphs.en: But how can you develop a reading habit? First, choose books that intrigue you. It could be a novel, a biography, or a science magazine. Second, set a schedule – for instance, read before bed. Consistency is key.
paragraphs.zh: 但如何培养阅读习惯呢？首先，选择让你感兴趣的书。可以是小说、传记或科学杂志。其次，制定一个时间表——例如，睡前阅读。坚持是关键。

paragraphs.en: Another advice is to join a reading group. Sharing thoughts with others can deepen your understanding and make reading more enjoyable. You can also keep a reading diary to record what you learn and feel.
paragraphs.zh: 另一个建议是加入阅读小组。与他人分享思考可以加深你的理解，并使阅读更有趣。你也可以写阅读日记，记录你所学的和所感的。

paragraphs.en: In today's digital age, reading is more accessible than ever. E-books and online articles allow you to read anytime, anywhere. However, try to avoid distractions like social media. Focus on the material to get the most out of it.
paragraphs.zh: 在当今数字时代，阅读比以往任何时候都更容易。电子书和在线文章让你随时随地阅读。然而，要尽量避免社交媒体等分心事物。专注于材料以最大限度获益。

paragraphs.en: Finally, remember that reading is a journey, not a race. Don't be anxious if you read slowly. The important thing is to enjoy the process. Over time, you will see how reading enriches your life in many ways.
paragraphs.zh: 最后，记住阅读是一场旅程，而不是比赛。如果读得慢，不要焦虑。重要的是享受过程。久而久之，你会看到阅读如何从多方面丰富你的生活。

vocab.def: adj. 可接近的，易获取的
